overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of Batgirl standing on a rainy industrial rooftop at night. The character surveys the Gotham City skyline, turning from a view of urban infrastructure to an industrial sector with distant fires burning amidst the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy industrial rooftop overlooking commercial district

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rooftop, looking out over the cityscape toward the left

entered.detail: large industrial billboard structure with metal framework and support beams
wet concrete rooftop with yellow painted markings and rain puddles
distant illuminated city buildings visible through the rain
steam rising from a vent on the rooftop surface
tall industrial street lamps casting light through the rain

segments.scene_description: Batgirl stands on a rain-soaked industrial rooftop at night, facing a large metal billboard structure to the left. Steam rises from rooftop vents as she observes the distant city skyline, with street lights cutting through the heavy rain and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sector overlook with burning facilities

events.description: orange fire glow from industrial buildings becomes visible, warming the right side of the scene
character completes 180-degree turn from left to right, shifting view to industrial complex

agents.ego_description: standing on rooftop, now facing the industrial sector with visible fires and smokestacks in the distance

entered.detail: large industrial buildings with glowing orange fires and illuminated windows
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke into the rainy night sky

segments.scene_description: Having turned to face the industrial sector, Batgirl now overlooks burning facilities and smokestacks to the right. The scene is lit by the warm orange glow of distant fires contrasting with the cool blue rain, while the city skyline shifts to the left of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement on a rain-soaked industrial rooftop that shifts from a view of the distant city skyline to a burning industrial sector. It begins with Batgirl facing a large metal billboard as steam rises from rooftop vents and street lights pierce through the heavy rain and atmospheric haze. As she turns her gaze, the perspective pivots away from the urban center, causing the city skyline to shift toward the left of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a landscape of smokestacks and burning facilities to the right, where the cool blue tones of the downpour contrast with the warm orange glow of distant fires.
